description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and test. The build job checks out the repository on an ubuntu-latest environment, runs make commands to build binaries, and uploads the binaries as artifacts. The test job depends on the build job, uses a matrix strategy to test with different Rust versions, downloads the build artifacts, and runs make commands to test the binaries.
